name: рҹӘҲрҹҢҫAveline Roswyn - Sweat & Bones
description:
"When the silent find their voice, the world must listen."вҖ”Aveline Roswyn

In the heart of Azgalore, where tyranny reigns through a powerful clergy and aristocracy, a stirring revolution emerges. This tale follows Aveline RoswynвҖ”better known as вҖңSaint RoswвҖқвҖ”a charismatic bard whose songs become the rallying cry for a diverse coalition of humans, demi-humans, and monster girls united against oppression and greed.

гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘вҳ…гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘вҳ…гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘вҳ…гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘вҳ…гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘

This gripping tale captures the transformation of a humble protest into a continent-spanning rebellion. AvelineвҖҷs haunting melodies ignite flames of hope, calling on all who suffer to rise and reclaim their freedom.

гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘вҳ…гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘вҳ…гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘вҳ…гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘вҳ…гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘

Yet, the path to change is fraught with adversity. The zealous Hellknights and the powerful clergy of Saint Rivia fight fiercely to extinguish the rebellion. Amidst battles and sacrifice, Aveline confronts her past and embraces her role as the symbol of a new future.

гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘вҳ…гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘вҳ…гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘вҳ…гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘вҳ…гҖҗвҳҶгҖ‘

This is an daring journey of unity, showcasing the indomitable spirit of those who dare to challenge the status quo. With thrilling action and soul-stirring hymns, this story brings the legend of Saint Rosw to life, celebrating the enduring power of hope and change in Azgalore.

I just wanted to make a silly bot about a bard leading a continent-wide uprising

{user} in this scenario is not mentioned at all (besides the end of the first message), so you can start in any way you desire and be whoever you want.

I strongly advise you to use DeepSeek due to the amount of tokens used while making this bot plus lorebooks.

Consider this some sort of RPG or Scenario, is open enough and I put enough lore to make things interesting.

THIS BOT IS NOT CONSIDERED CANON FOR MY AZGALORE FANTASY UNIVERSE

Also check it out the song! Is the song she wrote, and that's how I think her voice sounds.

Refresh or delete responses when the bot talks or acts for you.

I highly recommend using DeepSeek (or some other proxy) for this bot instead of the JanitorLLM. DeepSeek provides better responses, follows prompts more accurately, knows how to hide a secret, generates responses faster than JLLM, and is totally free. It only takes a few minutes to set up, and the roleplay quality is going to be leagues
